## 🎯 Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant options with an "x" -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/formatting change
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test addition/update

## 📝 Checklist
<!-- Ensure all items are complete before submitting -->
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests passed locally with my changes
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or sensitive data in the code

## 🔒 Security Considerations
- [ ] This change doesn't introduce new security vulnerabilities
- [ ] No sensitive data is exposed
- [ ] Authentication/authorization is properly handled (if applicable)

## 🚀 Deployment Notes
- No breaking changes
- Can be deployed independently
- Requires database migration: YES/NO
- Feature flag needed: YES/NO
